scenes.speaker: STORY
scenes.text: The engine sputters. Your van comes to a halt on a deserted stretch of I-5. Fog rolls over the hood.

scenes.speaker: STRANGER
scenes.text: Hey! You there! This road isn't safe. Help me clear these things and maybe we both make it through the night.

scenes.speaker: ELIAS
scenes.text: I appreciate it. I'm Elias. Watch my back—they're coming from the trees!

scenes.speaker: ELIAS
scenes.text: Fine. Die your way then. But they're coming regardless!

scenes.speaker: STORY
scenes.text: The last of the creatures falls. The silence that follows is heavy. You've survived the first of many dead roads.

scenes.speaker: STORY
scenes.text: The darkness consumes you. Another name added to the list of the fallen.
